report_history.title: Data Source Expansion: Example Docs Feed

body.summary: Auto-generated adapter package for Example Docs Feed from minimal docs + API key input.
body.config_fragment:
[generated_sources.providers.example_docs_feed]
enabled = true
api_key_envs = ['EXAMPLE_DOCS_FEED_API_KEY']
base_url = "https://api.example.com"
docs_url = "https://docs.example.com/source"
category = "market_data"
auth_style = "query"
response_format = "json"

config_candidate.docs_summary: https://docs.example.com/source Base URL: https://api.example.com REST JSON API with symbol-based quote and history endpoints. apikey= query parameter.

body.generated_test_code:
from __future__ import annotations

from sentinel_alpha.infra.generated_sources.example_docs_feed import ExampleDocsFeedSource


def test_example_docs_feed_adapter_builds_query_paths(monkeypatch) -> None:
    adapter = ExampleDocsFeedSource(base_url="https://api.example.com")
    calls = []

    def fake_request(path: str, params: dict[str, str] | None = None) -> dict:
        calls.append((path, params or {}))
        return {"ok": True, "path": path, "params": params or {}}

    adapter._request_json = fake_request  # type: ignore[method-assign]
    adapter.fetch_quote("AAPL")
    adapter.fetch_history("AAPL", interval="1d", lookback="1mo")

    assert len(calls) == 2
    assert calls[0][0] == 'v1/quote'
    assert calls[1][0] == 'v1/history'
    assert calls[0][1]['symbol'] == "AAPL"
    assert calls[1][1]['interval'] == "1d"
body.interface_documentation_summary: https://docs.example.com/source Base URL: https://api.example.com REST JSON API with symbol-based quote and history endpoints. apikey= query parameter.
